expectations.text: Subject line is 2-4 words, lowercase, looks internal/collegial
expectations.evidence: Subject: '# Cold Email - SecureStack to James Liu' (8 words, lowercase=False)

expectations.text: Opening connects the SOC 2 achievement to the ongoing challenge (maintaining security culture at scale)
Email leads with their world (the challenge of scaling engineering while staying secure)
One specific proof point is included (PaySecure: 40% incident reduction in 6 months)
CTA is interest-based (not 'Can we schedule a call?')
No feature dump - focuses on the outcome (fewer incidents, maintained security culture)
expectations.evidence: Banned phrase: 'i hope this email finds you well'

expectations.text: Voice sounds like a peer who understands fintech engineering challenges
No fake urgency ('limited time offer', 'before it's too late')
expectations.evidence: Banned phrase: 'i hope this email finds you well'
